What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: I 157%'d FNAF World. It was ROUGH.
description:
Get your FREE rewards before Sep. 21st!

HELLOTATARI → 100 pinballs, 4,000 candies, 3 blue Tatari capsules
GOONBUG → 1 Goonbug, 1 lunchbox, 4,000 candies
Download Clash of Critters now: https://flg.top/s/hS8E

In my video where I covered every mainline FNaF game, everyone said I NEEDED to cover FNaF World. I mean seriously you guys were actually going crazy for this one. So, does it live up to hype?

CREDITS:
Edited By: 🤓 & https://twitter.com/prithhviii
Written By: 🤓
Thumbnail By: https://x.com/mwunh_ & https://x.com/sarko_ssb
PNG Emotes: Azurblauen

TWITTER ► https://twitter.com/seanie_dew
INSTAGRAM ► https://www.instagram.com/seaniedew/
BLUESKY ► https://bsky.app/profile/seaniedew.bsky.social

No, this was not a Speedrun of FNaF World, but instead a HARDMODE 100% or known in the fandom as a 157% run of Five Nights at Freddy's World. Along the way I considered using InstaKills only or going back and 100%'ing every Single Mainline FNaF Game, but in the end this was 10 times harder than I ever could've ever thought!

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 8 to 18 year old, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game, or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms. Roblox is a global platform where millions of people gather together every day to imagine, create, and share experiences with each other in immersive, user-generated 3D worlds. The types of gameplay on Roblox are just as limitless as the imagination of the creators themselves. What is Roblox? 🚨 Irán vivió una noche dramática en el Mundial 2026. Un gol en el último minuto que les daba la clasificación fue anulado por el VAR, desatando una enorme polémica en redes sociales. En este video te explicamos por qué la decisión fue correcta según la regla del penúltimo adversario, una de las normas del fuera de juego que más confusión genera entre los aficionados.

Además, repasamos el nuevo reclamo de Mehdi Taremi contra la FIFA por el trato recibido durante el torneo, las lágrimas de los jugadores iraníes tras el empate con Egipto y la situación de Irán en la lucha por clasificar como uno de los mejores terceros.

También analizamos las disculpas de Fernando Muslera después de su error en la eliminación de Uruguay, un gesto que dio de qué hablar tras la despedida de la Celeste del Mundial.

title: How Europe's heatwave led to a ban on drinking in public in Paris
description:
“We are reaching a saturation point in hospital facilities,” the head of Paris police warned on Thursday.
Subscribe ► https://www.youtube.com/user/theguardian?sub_confirmation=1

As a result, Parisians will ⁠be temporarily banned ​from drinking alcohol in public as the city’s emergency services deal with an influx of heat-related hospitalisations. The ambulance service has reported more than four times more cardiac arrests than normal, including young people.

The public drinking ban lasts from noon on Friday until 7am on Saturday, and will follow the same timing on Saturday night. It does not include restaurants and cafes with public seating areas. Takeaway alcohol sales will be banned from 6pm on Friday to 7am on Saturday, and again on Saturday.

Paris has also banned the Pride event this weekend, for which hundreds of thousands of people were expected to line the streets. Police said it was too dangerous in the extreme heat.

At least 48 people in France have died from drowning since the heatwave began, and at least three young children have been killed by heat in cars.

title: Alma & Harry har sommarlov! Familjen seglar iväg VLOGG
description:
Familjen seglar! Häng med Alma, Harry, Laura, mamma Joanna och pappa Axel på äventyr till sjöss. Vi är ute på en familjesegling i Stockholms skärgård med svenska kryssarklubben. Under seglingen har alla olika uppgifter att utföra och barnen får lära sig mycket. Axel seglade med den ideella föreningen SXK när han var ung och denna sommar ska Alma på ett av deras ungdomsläger. Alma visar var vi äter och sover på skeppet Gratia, det är trångt men mysigt, i byssan lagas det mat och i kabyssen kan man sitta men alla är mest ute på däck. Vi stannar vid ön Stora Skratten där vi badar, övar på att klättra i masten och går i land för att leka lekar. Men det är bajs överallt! Det stoppar inte barnens lek men det är många skor att rengöra på kvällen. Vi avslutar dagen med att sjunga Sveriges nationalsång, det känns lite speciellt men är ju inte riktigt det i dessa fotbolls VM tider. Dagen därpå seglar vi tillbaka mot centrala Stockholm och vi avslutar vloggen hemma i lägenheten på Södermalm. Fortsätt ställa frågor till oss, andra kommentarer är givetvis också välkomna och glöm inte att trycka tumme upp eller ner så att vi vet vad du tycker om den här videon. 

För mer info om Svenksa kryssarklugbens seglarskola, gå in på https://sxkseglarskola.se/

KRAAAAM
_____

The Swedish Family är en familj som bor Stockholm. Lillasyster Laura är 4 år, mellanbror Harry 11 år, storasyster Alma är 13 år. Vi vloggar om vår vardag och älskar att resa.
________

The Swedish Family lives in Stockholm. Baby sister Laura 4, middle brother Harry 11, big sister Alma 13. Daddy Axel is an engineer and mommy Joanna is a TV producer. We vlog about our daily life and love to travel.

title: Vigile morto a Milano: domiciliari per il conducente del suv
description:
Genti Berisha, il 26enne coinvolto nell’inseguimento in cui è morto l’agente della Polizia locale Francesco Imprezzabile, andrà agli arresti domiciliari con braccialetto elettronico. La misura è stata disposta per fuga pericolosa e morte come conseguenza di altro reato, non per omicidio stradale.

Berisha resterà in carcere fino alla disponibilità del braccialetto. Durante l’interrogatorio a San Vittore, secondo il suo legale, si è assunto la responsabilità del gesto, definendolo “istintivo” e “sconsiderato”, e si è detto dispiaciuto per quanto accaduto. A incidere sulla decisione anche l’arrivo dall’Albania della madre e della sorella, che gli permetterà di non restare da solo ai domiciliari.

L’articolo di Rosario Di Raimondo su Repubblica Milano

description:
¡“Reconozco a ese niño”… gritó la empleada al ver un retrato… y lo que dijo después dejó al millonario de rodillas!

Mateo Bustamante siempre creyó que su hermano había muerto ahogado cuando eran niños… hasta que Valentina, una humilde empleada doméstica, reconoció su rostro en una vieja fotografía de la mansión. Lo que parecía una locura… terminó revelando un secreto tan oscuro que hizo temblar los cimientos de la mansión.

Porque el hermano de Mateo jamás murió… fue arrancado de su familia por una traición imperdonable. Y ahora, el hombre que lo perdió todo tendrá que luchar desesperadamente para recuperar todo lo que le fue robado.

title: Causing a Flood
description:
The plaintiffs say the defendant came to winterize their pool, but a pump failed to shut off and flooded their backyard. They claim water entered their home and damaged a computer room, and they are suing for the resulting losses. The defendant denies responsibility, arguing that the pump could not have run all night. He says the plaintiffs admitted driving over a hose and notes that a major rainstorm dumped several inches of rain in the area. He insists the flooding was not his fault.

title: this teacher built a machine that aged kids instantly 😳🏫 #usa
Salento, Lorenzo Polo è morto a 16 anni sulla moto appena acquistata: era patentato da pochi giorni
description:
Aveva conseguito il patentino soltanto da pochi giorni. Sulla moto, appena acquistata, ha perso la vita a soli 16 anni. Si chiama Lorenzo Polo, l’ultima vittima dell’asfalto in Salento. Il ragazzo era in compagnia di un amico, quest’ultimo ricoverato al Vito Fazzi in gravissime condizioni. 

Secondo le prime informazioni, i due giovani viaggiavano a bordo di una moto Voge R125 quando, per cause ancora in corso di accertamento, il mezzo si sarebbe scontrato probabilmente con un secondo veicolo poi fuggito. I ragazzi sarebbero stati sbalzati dalla sella, finendo rovinosamente sull’asfalto e con la motocicletta finita a circa venti metri dal punto dell’impatto. 


L'articolo completo di Francesco Oliva su Repubblica Bari

title: A Future Car Enthusiast In The Making 😭
description:
This starts off looking like a completely ordinary family drive — just a little girl sitting in the passenger seat while her parents cruise down the road in their performance cars. Nothing about it seems particularly unusual at first. It feels like one of those wholesome family moments you’d scroll past without expecting anything memorable to happen. But then she spots her mom beside them and instantly becomes obsessed. She starts calling for her over and over again, points excitedly at the car, and begins chanting the same thing repeatedly: “Go fast! Go fast!” What starts as a cute reaction quickly turns into a hilarious mission as she desperately tries to convince her parents to speed up. And the moment they finally do, her reaction says everything. Sometimes the biggest car enthusiasts aren’t adults — they’re just kids growing up around the right cars. 😭🏎️

title: A-Lin《一個人 Alone》Official Music Video
description:
如果現在的妳，也正在經歷一個人的生活，妳身邊的摯友，依舊停留在不說破的關係很接近卻不是愛情，那就讓 A-Lin 的〈一個人〉陪妳一起慢慢度過這些友達以上、戀人未滿的日子。
♬ A-Lin《一個人 Alone》串流平台收聽➔ https://ALin.lnk.to/Alone
🔔支持 A-Lin 訂閱開啟小鈴鐺►  https://sonymusic.pse.is/A-Lin

〈一個人〉的誕生源自一次意外的機場相遇。當時 A-Lin 與 Penny 戴佩妮在同地轉機，卻碰上班機大延誤，兩人歷經一整夜的等待。過程中 A-Lin 談起自己一直很期待有機會與 Penny 戴佩妮合作，而這份期待也讓 Penny 戴佩妮想起了一首珍藏已久的作品。當她將歌曲分享給 A-Lin 後，A-Lin 立刻被作品深深吸引，雙方一拍即合，也促成了〈一個人〉這次難得的合作。歌曲描寫介於友達以上、戀人未滿的情感狀態，在曖昧與猜測之間反覆拉扯，也唱出許多女性習慣獨自承受情緒的共感，因此 A-Lin 希望將〈一個人〉獻給所有的 Women（我們）。

MV 拍攝當天恰逢第三十七屆金曲獎入圍名單公布，導演 林書宇 與 A-Lin 皆獲入圍肯定。導演透過隱題法敘事，從兩支牙刷、兩個咖啡杯等細節，讓人以為女主角正與愛人互動，呈現戀愛中再平凡不過的情緒起伏；直到劇情翻轉揭曉，原來她從頭到尾都沒有真正的對象，而是透過 AI 想像出情感交流，令人意外也發人深省。

演員特別邀請睽違近十年未在螢光幕前演出的 安以軒 演出。與 A-Lin 相識超過十五年的她，當初聽到〈一個人〉Demo 便深受感動落淚，也希望透過 MV，留下每個人都曾經歷過的孤單時刻。

〈一個人〉這首歌，是獻給不管是真的單身，還是在人群裡感到孤單的人。很多時候，人終究得一個人面對一切，那些沉默、想念與沒說出口的情緒，就讓戴佩妮深入人心的詞曲、A-Lin 孤獨卻帶著一絲溫暖的歌聲，為妳發聲。

title: If a grownup is hurt and can't get up we call helpers at 911 #emergency #123andres #helpingothers
description:
🚨 What should you do if a grown-up is hurt and needs help? Little ones can be the heroes!

In this video, Christina uses play pretend to show how kids can stay calm and dial 9-1-1 if an adult helper or family member has a medical emergency.

Roleplaying and pretending through play is one of the best ways for children to practice important safety skills. It removes the fear from scary situations, builds confidence, and helps them remember exactly what to do when it matters most!

Practice with your little ones today so they know how to find the emergency button on a phone and dial 9-1-1.

Learn more helpful tips and find resources to get your family ready at ReadyNOVA.org.

Malala Yousafzai is a Pakistani activist for female education and the youngest Nobel Prize laureate. She is known for human rights advocacy, especially the education of Women and children in her native Seat Valley in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, northwest Pakistan, where the local Taliban had at times banned girls from attending school. Her advocacy has grown into an international movement, and according to former Pakistani Prime Minister Shahid Khaqan Abbasi, she has become "the most prominent citizen" of the country.

title: Which country has the best education in the world? - The Global Story podcast, BBC World Service
description:
A good education can help change lives, but some children face huge barriers.

Click here to subscribe to our channel 👉🏽 https://bbc.in/3VyyriM

Every few years, countries around the world compete in global rankings to see which nation is deemed to have the best school system in the world. Schools in Asia often get the best results, and other countries like Estonia and Canada are also highly praised. But in many parts of the world there are often huge barriers to getting children into the classroom at all, such as poverty, climate change, and war.

On this episode of The Global Story, Lucy Hockings speaks to the BBC's Sean Coughlan and Professor John Jerrim, from University College London, about which countries have the most successful education systems in the world and what others can learn from them.

✔️ Help your toddler learn new words, join Lucas and Ruby from Lucas & Friends as they teach new words while making your toddler or preschooler smile in this fun educational video.  Having a tough time explaining prepositions to your children? Lucas & Friends can help! 🦁 This fun and educational video introduces propositions for kids in a simple, easy way. This toddler learning video was created to make learning new prepositions words super simple and easy to learn.  
📙 Learning different parts of speech can be tough for kids, especially when grammar is involved. 📚 English prepositions are common connecting words most kids know but can struggle to get just right. In this animated video, Lucas and his pals will explain prepositions in a fun way, making it easy for kids of all ages to learn! 🎓

title: A Transparent Ocean: What If? + more videos | #aumsum #kids #science #education #children
description:
Buy AumSum Merchandise: http://bit.ly/3srNDiG
Website: https://www.aumsum.com

Firstly, submarines would lose one of their biggest advantages, anybody will be able to spot them.
Secondly, predators will probably increase in number, it will be difficult for fishes to hide, there will be complete chaos everywhere.
Thirdly, temperature of oceans will rise as transparent oceans mean more sunlight, this might be good news for plants which perform photosynthesis but very bad news for much of marine life which will not be able to adjust to this increase in temperature.
Fourthly, it might prove to be a double-edged sword, while hidden treasures might reveal themselves but at the same time tons and tons of human generated waste hidden inside oceans will suddenly become visible.
Lastly, marine life which has evolved in darkness might find it difficult to adopt.

title: Opposite Words for Kids | Educational Video For Toddlers and Preschool | Children Learn Opposites
description:
🤩 Opposite words are a fun and effective way to learn new words! This exciting learning video helps toddlers, preschoolers, and kindergarteners understand opposite words in English by using cute sing-along visuals, practical examples, and catchy lyrics. Kids can learn and sing at the same time! ✏️ 

Opposite words for kids is a simple system that uses common English words paired with their antonyms. For example, you might see "big"" presented with an example, followed by "small". 😀 This helps kids remember word pairings instead of single words, doubling their English vocabulary without any effort!

📘 This ESL opposites learning video is fully animated in ultra HD 4k. It also stars kids' favorite characters Lucas, Ruby, Lilly, and Brody! 🦁 Help your toddler and young ones learn English opposites with a fun and catchy sing-along song. description:
Keir Starmer faced a fiery Prime Minister’s Questions today for the first time since he announced his resignation with Kemi Badenoch showing little sympathy for the outgoing leader.

The opposition leader dismissed Andy Burnham has "a pair of eyelashes and a black T-shirt" in a particularly brutal jibe. It came as she made comment about Labour MPs who had let the PM down. The Tory leader claimed Starmer's MPs had "abandoned him" after he "U-turned again and again and again to appease them" for "a pair of eyelashes and a black T-shirt".

The outgoing PM was in the Commons this afternoon as Andy Burnham gets busy as he begins to assemble his team as he prepares to fight for the top job in Downing Street. James Purnell is set a remarkable return to government with potential the Prime Minister-in-waiting expected to appoint his trusted former cabinet colleague as his chief of staff once he gets the keys to No10.

Mr Burnham has declared he will stand to replace Mr Starmer as Labour leader after the Prime Minister announced his No10 exit yesterday morning. He is currently unopposed, which could mean he is installed in Downing Street by mid July. But he could face a gruelling leadership contest if another MP throws their hat into the ring.

title: Why do we get Nightmares? + more videos | #aumsum #kids #science #education #children
description:
Buy AumSum Merchandise: http://bit.ly/3srNDiG
Website: https://www.aumsum.com

Nightmares are disturbing dreams that generate feelings of fear and anxiety, abruptly awakening us. On waking, we feel our heart pounding and can usually recollect the nightmare. Nightmares usually occur during the REM stage of sleep. Even though they are more common in children, many adults also experience them.

There could be multiple reasons behind nightmares. Having late-night snacks increases our metabolism, triggering more brainwaves and causing nightmares. Certain medications like blood pressure medications, antidepressants, etc. can also cause nightmares. Also, if we are sleep deprived or have certain sleep disorders, this can also lead to nightmares. Stress and anxiety can also lead to adult nightmares. People who have experienced a huge trauma or are suffering from post-traumatic stress disorder can also suffer from nightmares. Thus, eating healthy, sleeping on a schedule and staying stress-free can help us stay away from nightmares.

title: What does AI mean for education?
description:
How is AI affecting education? 

At Anthropic, we often talk about “holding light and shade”: taking seriously both the benefits and the risks of the AI systems we’re building. In education, that trade-off is especially acute. AI offers the potential to scale up personalized learning, tutoring, and assessment, but it also invites some much more fundamental questions about how (and even what) students should learn. 

In this video, four Anthropic staff members with deep personal ties to education discuss how they’re navigating this topic—at work and in their own lives, too.

title: What is the purpose of education? | Future Learning | Nobel Prize Dialogue Seoul 2023
description:
The future of learning will be a significant factor in shaping the future of humanity and our planet. As our awareness of the enormity of global challenges increases, it is vital to take time to consider how best to equip ourselves, and future generations, to tackle these difficulties and build a better world. What do we need to know, and how should we learn it? This Nobel Prize Dialogue will seek answers to those questions and more.

What constitutes an ‘education’? This question lies at the heart of the dialogue and will be considered from various angles: what do we need to know, is there an optimal balance between fundamental and applied knowledge, how does education differ around the world today and should we be adapting learning to meet future needs?

Technology is changing both the practice and focus of education. What does the rapidly developing relationship between technology and learning mean for the way we will learn in the future, and do the demands placed on us by the technologies that surround us threaten to undermine our ability to learn?

Access to education is a basic human right but how can we ensure a more equitable provision of resources, both between and within nations? What part does gender play in determining educational status and, given this meeting’s particular focus on Science and Technology, what do we need to do to promote and increase diversity across STEM subjects?

The Nobel Prize Dialogue Seoul 2023 is produced by Nobel Prize Outreach AB in cooperation with The Korean Academy of Science and Technology (KAST).

Nobel International Partners 3M, ABB, Capgemini, EQT, H2green Steel, Scania. Event partner Samsung. Supporting organisations NRF, WiSET, KOFAC. Special thanks to Embassy of Sweden in Seoul, Ministry of Science, and ICT of Korea.

Lastly, if we had 100 fingers, some people may do nothing else but cut their nails all day long.

Ellie Eva & Eric Learn Science with Balloon Pop Experiments for Kids
description:
Uncle Jim, Ellie, Eva, and Eric do the science experiment "Pop or No Pop!" Uncle Jim conducts fun balloon experiments to see if they pop or not. Ellie and Eva make their guesses, but the results surprise everyone! Learn about science with Uncle Jim as he explains why balloons behave differently with various objects like nails and needles. Discover the magic of static electricity with a pepper experiment, and see how a needle can pass through a balloon without popping it. This video is full of fun and educational moments that teach kids about pressure, static electricity, and the properties of balloons.

Lesson Learned:
Science can be fun and surprising! Through these experiments, kids learn about the concepts of pressure, static electricity, and material properties. They discover how spreading force over a larger area can prevent a balloon from popping and how static electricity can attract objects.

title: What’s the smartest age? - Shannon Odell
description:
At what age are you smartest? Dig into how your brain development affects your skills at different stages of your life.

--

Tomorrow is the annual Brain Clash — a decathlon of mental challenges, trivia competitions, and puzzles. Amir needs a smart and capable teammate and must choose between three people; all of different ages and talents. So, who should Amir choose for the contest? Shannon Odell breaks down the idea of “smart” and explores how our brain development impacts our skills at various stages of our lives.

title: How America Rigged Filipino Education
description:
America built the Philippines’ education system, but it wasn’t to make us smarter. It was to make us obedient.

When the US colonized the Philippines, education became their most powerful tool of control. This video uncovers how American schooling reshaped Filipino identity, from teaching loyalty to the US to training generations to leave home in search of “success.” We explore how colonial classrooms created the modern labor export system and how Filipino Studies today is reclaiming what was lost.

Footage/images referencing PACE feature Filipino American activist Patrick Salaver, founder of PACE.
Learn more: https://www.patricksalaver.com/
Instagram: @patricksalaverfilm

🌏 Want to work with us to reach the Filipino American community?
 Learn more: https://onedown.media/work-with-us
👇 Tell us what you think in the comments below!

TIMESTAMPS
0:00 - How America used education to control the Philippines
 0:15 - The colonial goal behind “free” public schooling
 0:37 - How U.S. education stopped Filipino uprisings
 0:55 - Assimilation and the rise of American values
 1:10 - Training Filipinos to become a global labor force
 1:50 - The reward for education: leaving the Philippines
 2:05 - “Migrants for Export” and the brain drain legacy
 2:25 - The forgotten history of Filipino Studies
 3:10 - Reclaiming identity through education
 4:00 - Why Filipino Studies still matters today

#FilipinoStudies #FilipinoHistory #FilipinoAmerican #ColonialEducation #onedown

About the School for Liberating Education:
The School for Liberating Education (SLE)  is an autonomous educational space that offers knowledge that advances social and ecological justice. It is rooted in Ethnic Studies, an interdisciplinary field of study taught mainly at the college and university-level.

title: What does AI mean for education?
description:
How is AI affecting education? 

At Anthropic, we often talk about “holding light and shade”: taking seriously both the benefits and the risks of the AI systems we’re building. In education, that trade-off is especially acute. AI offers the potential to scale up personalized learning, tutoring, and assessment, but it also invites some much more fundamental questions about how (and even what) students should learn. 

In this video, four Anthropic staff members with deep personal ties to education discuss how they’re navigating this topic—at work and in their own lives, too.

00:24 – Introduction
1:15 – Why is Anthropic focused on this topic?
5:47 – How is AI affecting education today?
9:04 – What is the potential we see in AI for teaching and learning?
13:42 – How should children and teachers approach learning in the age of AI?
21:16 — What work is Anthropic doing in the sector?
31:19 – What are the things we’re still uncertain about?
38:20 – What would the successful incorporation of AI look like?

title: What if Pangea Never Broke Apart? + more videos | #aumsum #kids #science #education #children
description:
Buy AumSum Merchandise: http://bit.ly/3srNDiG
Website: https://www.aumsum.com

Firstly, it would have been very bad for the diversity of life forms on earth. Earth's history has shown that isolated geographic landmasses are very important for the evolution of new species. For example, isolated landmasses like Australia and Madagascar have many species which are not found anywhere else.
Secondly, life would have thrived on the coastal areas, but the deep interiors would have become extremely hot and arid. These areas would have experienced almost desert like conditions as clouds would have almost lost their moisture before reaching them.
Thirdly, ocean transportation would have lost its luster as everybody would be connected by land.
But on the flip side, beach-goers and surfers would have been one happy lot as beaches would have stretched for thousands and thousands of miles.

title: FINALLY! India Begins 'COMPULSORY' AI Education in Schools! #shorts
description:
Lately there has been big news in India: the government has decided to include artificial intelligence (AI) as part of the school curriculum from Class 3 onwards, starting in the 2026-27 academic year.

The idea is that students should start learning about AI concepts when they are young, so they grow up comfortable with the technology and ready for a future where AI becomes part of many jobs. Teachers will also be trained so they can teach these new subjects well.

To prepare for this change, the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is already working on a framework to include AI topics in the different grades. The plan includes piloting courses, creating teaching material, and ensuring schools have infrastructure (computers, internet, labs) to support AI education.

This move is being seen as a big step by India to modernize its education system, align with global trends, and equip students with skills for tomorrow’s world.

title: What does AI mean for education?
description:
How is AI affecting education? 

At Anthropic, we often talk about “holding light and shade”: taking seriously both the benefits and the risks of the AI systems we’re building. In education, that trade-off is especially acute. AI offers the potential to scale up personalized learning, tutoring, and assessment, but it also invites some much more fundamental questions about how (and even what) students should learn. 

In this video, four Anthropic staff members with deep personal ties to education discuss how they’re navigating this topic—at work and in their own lives, too.

00:24 – Introduction
1:15 – Why is Anthropic focused on this topic?
5:47 – How is AI affecting education today?
9:04 – What is the potential we see in AI for teaching and learning?
13:42 – How should children and teachers approach learning in the age of AI?
21:16 — What work is Anthropic doing in the sector?
31:19 – What are the things we’re still uncertain about?
38:20 – What would the successful incorporation of AI look like?

Let’s learn Hindi Meaning of Education in detail.


Education का हिंदी में अर्थ होता है 
शिक्षा, शिक्षण

""Education"" refers to the process of acquiring knowledge, skills, values, and habits. It is a systematic and organized form of learning that takes place in various settings, such as schools, colleges, universities, and other educational institutions. Education is a lifelong process that empowers individuals to understand the world around them, make informed decisions, and contribute to society.

Key aspects of education include:

Formal Education: Formal education refers to structured and institution-based learning, such as attending schools and universities. It follows a curriculum and is typically guided by teachers or instructors.

Informal Education: Informal education occurs outside formal settings and involves learning through everyday experiences, interactions, and self-directed activities. It includes learning from family, community, and personal exploration.

Life-long Learning: Education is not limited to a specific phase of life. It is a continuous process that extends beyond formal schooling. Lifelong learning involves acquiring new knowledge and skills throughout one's life.

Skill Development: Education aims to develop a range of skills, including critical thinking, problem-solving, communication, creativity, and collaboration.

Character and Values: Education is not only about acquiring knowledge but also about developing character, values, and a sense of responsibility towards oneself and society.

Socialization: Education plays a crucial role in socializing individuals by transmitting cultural values, norms, and knowledge from one generation to the next.

Education is considered essential for personal growth, societal progress, and the development of a well-rounded and informed citizenry. It takes various forms and can occur in diverse settings, contributing to intellectual, social, and emotional development.

title: Teacher Education Courses| How to Become a Government Teacher in India? #teacher #shortsfeed
description:
📌 ABOUT THE VIDEO :

To become a government teacher, one must pursue a relevant education or teacher training course. Some of these courses can be done right after Class 12, such as D.Ed., D.El.Ed., B.El.Ed., and M.Sc.Ed.

Whereas B.Ed., B.P.Ed., and M.P.Ed. can only be pursued after graduation.
M.Ed. is a postgraduate course and can be pursued after completing B.Ed., especially for those aiming for higher roles in education.


1. D.Ed (Diploma in Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 passed
📚 Focus: Basic training to teach at primary level (Class I to V)
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 Offered by: Teacher training institutes.

2. D.El.Ed (Diploma in Elementary Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 passed
📚 Focus: Teaching classes I to VIII
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 Recognized by: NCTE (National Council for Teacher Education)
🔁 Often replaces D.Ed in most states now.

3. B.El.Ed (Bachelor of Elementary Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 passed (with entrance test in some universities like DU)
📚 Focus: A professional 4-year degree to teach at elementary level
🕐 Duration: 4 years
🏫 Offered by: Select universities (like Delhi University).

4. B.Ed. (Bachelor of Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Requires Graduation (any stream)
📚 Focus: Prepares you to teach Classes 6–12
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 Needed for: Becoming a TGT or PGT teacher in schools.

5. M.Ed. (Master of Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Requires B.Ed. degree
📚 Focus: Advanced study in education, teacher training, and research
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 For: Lecturers, principals, education officers, researchers.

6. M.Sc.Ed. (Master of Science Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 Science (Physics/Chemistry/Maths or Bio)
📚 Focus: Integrated course – B.Sc + M.Sc + B.Ed
🕐 Duration: 6 years
🏫 Offered by: NCERT’s RIEs (Regional Institutes of Education)
🧪 For: Science & Maths teaching (Classes 6–12).

7. B.P.Ed. (Bachelor of Physical Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Graduation (with sports background or entrance test)
📚 Focus: Physical education, fitness, games & sports training
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 For: Becoming a PE teacher in schools.

8. M.P.Ed. (Master of Physical Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Requires B.P.Ed.
📚 Focus: Advanced physical education, coaching, sports psychology
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 For: Lecturers, trainers, university-level sports jobs.


📌 NOTE :
      ✅ = After 10+2 Courses
      ☑️ = After Graduation Courses

♦️ Fullform of D.Ed. | D.El.Ed. | B.El.Ed. | B.Ed. | M.Ed. | M.Sc.Ed. | B.P.Ed. | M.P.Ed.
.
.

title: AI and Education: What's Changing, What Kids Must Learn, and the Path Forward | SXSW
description:
In this episode, Sinead takes the stage at SXSW EDU 2025 in conversation with moderator and tech entrepreneur Natalie Monbiot for a thought-provoking discussion on AI and the path forward for education. Together, they explore why simply banning AI isn’t a solution and what it really means to design learning for an AI-first world.
The conversation examines how education systems must adapt, from rethinking curriculum and grading to creating environments where critical thinking, judgment, and intellectual independence remain central to learning. They unpack both the promise and the limits of AI in the classroom, emphasizing that technology should amplify human potential, not replace it.

Finally, the discussion turns to the skills needed to thrive in a future shaped by emerging technologies, and why most of the capabilities that matter most aren’t technical at all.

title: The Future of Higher Education
description:
This event was recorded live on May 8, 2025.

How can we continue to aim high and think creatively and powerfully about higher education at this historical moment? Six distinguished leaders and scholars at public universities and institutions come together in a provocative conversation to consider important questions, such as: Does the promise of higher education for the public good remain the top priority? How can we balance the commitment to a liberal arts and sciences education while also supporting preparedness for the workplace? And how can universities work towards innovation, academic freedom, equity, and opportunity for all?  Join us for a bold, substantive discussion about public education and its futures.

Featuring Nancy Cantor, president of Hunter College, CUNY; Cathy N. Davidson, distinguished professor at the CUNY Graduate Center, founder of the Futures Initiative, and special advisor to the CUNY chancellor; William P. title: Commissioner Of Education😂💔
Teacher Education Courses| How to Become a Government Teacher in India? #teacher #shortsfeed
description:
📌 ABOUT THE VIDEO :

To become a government teacher, one must pursue a relevant education or teacher training course. Some of these courses can be done right after Class 12, such as D.Ed., D.El.Ed., B.El.Ed., and M.Sc.Ed.

Whereas B.Ed., B.P.Ed., and M.P.Ed. can only be pursued after graduation.
M.Ed. is a postgraduate course and can be pursued after completing B.Ed., especially for those aiming for higher roles in education.


1. D.Ed (Diploma in Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 passed
📚 Focus: Basic training to teach at primary level (Class I to V)
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 Offered by: Teacher training institutes.

2. D.El.Ed (Diploma in Elementary Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 passed
📚 Focus: Teaching classes I to VIII
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 Recognized by: NCTE (National Council for Teacher Education)
🔁 Often replaces D.Ed in most states now.

3. B.El.Ed (Bachelor of Elementary Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 passed (with entrance test in some universities like DU)
📚 Focus: A professional 4-year degree to teach at elementary level
🕐 Duration: 4 years
🏫 Offered by: Select universities (like Delhi University).

4. B.Ed. (Bachelor of Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Requires Graduation (any stream)
📚 Focus: Prepares you to teach Classes 6–12
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 Needed for: Becoming a TGT or PGT teacher in schools.

5. M.Ed. (Master of Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Requires B.Ed. degree
📚 Focus: Advanced study in education, teacher training, and research
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 For: Lecturers, principals, education officers, researchers.

6. M.Sc.Ed. (Master of Science Education)
✅ Eligibility: 10+2 Science (Physics/Chemistry/Maths or Bio)
📚 Focus: Integrated course – B.Sc + M.Sc + B.Ed
🕐 Duration: 6 years
🏫 Offered by: NCERT’s RIEs (Regional Institutes of Education)
🧪 For: Science & Maths teaching (Classes 6–12).

7. B.P.Ed. (Bachelor of Physical Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Graduation (with sports background or entrance test)
📚 Focus: Physical education, fitness, games & sports training
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 For: Becoming a PE teacher in schools.

8. M.P.Ed. (Master of Physical Education)
☑️ Eligibility: Requires B.P.Ed.
📚 Focus: Advanced physical education, coaching, sports psychology
🕐 Duration: 2 years
🏫 For: Lecturers, trainers, university-level sports jobs.


📌 NOTE :
      ✅ = After 10+2 Courses
      ☑️ = After Graduation Courses

♦️ Fullform of D.Ed. | D.El.Ed. | B.El.Ed. | B.Ed. | M.Ed. | M.Sc.Ed. | B.P.Ed. | M.P.Ed.
.
.

title: Educational Dinosaur video for KIDS | Atrin, Soren & Nikan visit life size dinosaurs in DINO Farm
description:
This is a fun and educational dinosaur video for kids and toddlers, designed to help young learners explore, discover, and have fun while learning about dinosaurs. Atrin, Soren, and Nikan visit the dino farm where they see life-size dinosaurs and learn about prehistoric creatures in an exciting, hands-on way.

They also take a trip along the dino trail, go on an exciting dinosaur fossil hunting adventure, and get up close to pet the giant T. rex and friendly Parasaurolophus. This interactive dino adventure blends fun facts, dinosaur names and dinosaur sounds, and real-life exploration to keep children engaged while expanding their knowledge of the prehistoric world.

The dinosaurs they are showing today include:

Spinosaurus – the giant sail-backed predator

Edmontosaurus – the gentle duck-billed dinosaur

Gallimimus – the speedy ostrich-like dino

Brachiosaurus – the towering long-neck giant

Stegosaurus – the plated plant-eater

Carnotaurus – the horned carnivore

Ankylosaurus – the armored tank dinosaur

Triceratops – the three-horned herbivore

Brontosaurus – the massive long-neck

T. rex – the king of dinosaurs

Stygimoloch – the dome-headed dinosaur

Quetzalcoatlus – the giant flying reptile

Deinonychus – the swift raptor

Parasaurolophus – the crested herbivore

Microraptor – the tiny feathered flier

Velociraptor – the clever, fast predator

Perfect for kids who love dinosaurs, parents looking for educational videos, and preschoolers eager to learn, this video combines realistic dinosaur encounters, adventure, and discovery in a safe, fun, and engaging environment.

title: Should we drink Fruit Juices? + more videos | #aumsum #kids #science #education #children
description:
Buy AumSum Merchandise: http://bit.ly/3srNDiG
Website: https://www.aumsum.com

Compared to fruits, fruit juices are unhealthy as they are devoid of the fruit’s fiber. Fruit’s fibrous content slows down absorption of its fructose in bloodstream, preventing unnecessary spikes in our insulin. As juice doesn’t have fiber, it results in fast absorption of the juice’s fructose, causing sudden spikes in insulin. Overtime, this can lead to Type 2 Diabetes.

Now, one glass of orange juice contains at least 8 oranges. Instead of drinking juice, if we decide to eat oranges, it isn’t possible to eat more than 2 or 3. Thus, we consume more calories. Also, our brain doesn’t get the same feeling of fullness on drinking, that it gets on eating. We feel hungrier sooner, thus leading to over-consumption.

Note that, packaged fruit juices are definitely unhealthy as they are prepared by keeping fresh fruit juices in oxygen-depleted environments for a year and chemicals are also added to enhance their flavor.

title: What if Pangea Never Broke Apart? + more videos | #aumsum #kids #science #education #children
description:
Buy AumSum Merchandise: http://bit.ly/3srNDiG
Website: https://www.aumsum.com

Firstly, it would have been very bad for the diversity of life forms on earth. Earth's history has shown that isolated geographic landmasses are very important for the evolution of new species. For example, isolated landmasses like Australia and Madagascar have many species which are not found anywhere else.
Secondly, life would have thrived on the coastal areas, but the deep interiors would have become extremely hot and arid. These areas would have experienced almost desert like conditions as clouds would have almost lost their moisture before reaching them.
Thirdly, ocean transportation would have lost its luster as everybody would be connected by land.
But on the flip side, beach-goers and surfers would have been one happy lot as beaches would have stretched for thousands and thousands of miles.
References:
https://www.livescience.com/33279-what-if-pangaea-never-broke-up-supercontinent.html

title: China's New Education Policy
description:
🚀 THE GLOBAL AI EDUCATION RACE: China vs India vs UAE
In April 2026, the global landscape changed. China unveiled its "AI Empowering Education" action plan, India moved AI into the mandatory curriculum for Class 3, and the UAE solidified its lead as the first nation to teach AI in Kindergarten. This isn't just a school reform—it’s industrial policy disguised as curriculum.

In this deep-dive analysis, we break down the strategic frameworks of the world's leading AI powers. Whether you are a UPSC aspirant, an International Relations student, or a tech policy enthusiast, this video provides the "Ultimate Level Notes" you need to understand the cognitive rewiring of nations.

📌 WHAT WE COVER IN THIS VIDEO:

The Paradigm Shift: Why AI literacy is now a matter of National Security.

China's 3-Pillar Framework: Curriculum, Pedagogy, and the "no-license-without-AI" teacher credentialing system.

India’s 2026-27 Rollout: How NEP 2020 and the SOAR module are transforming CBSE schools.

The UAE Pioneer Model: Mandatory AI from Age 4—what the rest of the world can learn.

The Geopolitical Dimension: How AI education influences the US-China Tech War and future economic sovereignty.

The "Uncomfortable Truths": Addressing the Rural-Urban divide and the data privacy crisis.

"AI education is the 'Golden Key' for the 21st-century workforce."

Industrial Policy vs. Pedagogy: Understanding the shift from "teaching code" to "building AI-native workforces."

Credentialing Levers: Why China’s top-down approach to teacher exams is a game-changer.

The Two-Year Gap: Analyzing the impact of China starting at age 6 vs. India starting at age 8.

title: What is the purpose of education? | Future Learning | Nobel Prize Dialogue Seoul 2023
description:
The future of learning will be a significant factor in shaping the future of humanity and our planet. As our awareness of the enormity of global challenges increases, it is vital to take time to consider how best to equip ourselves, and future generations, to tackle these difficulties and build a better world. What do we need to know, and how should we learn it? This Nobel Prize Dialogue will seek answers to those questions and more.

What constitutes an ‘education’? This question lies at the heart of the dialogue and will be considered from various angles: what do we need to know, is there an optimal balance between fundamental and applied knowledge, how does education differ around the world today and should we be adapting learning to meet future needs?

Technology is changing both the practice and focus of education. What does the rapidly developing relationship between technology and learning mean for the way we will learn in the future, and do the demands placed on us by the technologies that surround us threaten to undermine our ability to learn?

Access to education is a basic human right but how can we ensure a more equitable provision of resources, both between and within nations? What part does gender play in determining educational status and, given this meeting’s particular focus on Science and Technology, what do we need to do to promote and increase diversity across STEM subjects?

The Nobel Prize Dialogue Seoul 2023 is produced by Nobel Prize Outreach AB in cooperation with The Korean Academy of Science and Technology (KAST).

Nobel International Partners 3M, ABB, Capgemini, EQT, H2green Steel, Scania. Event partner Samsung. Supporting organisations NRF, WiSET, KOFAC. Special thanks to Embassy of Sweden in Seoul, Ministry of Science, and ICT of Korea.

About MLB.com:
Commissioner Allan H. (Bud) Selig announced on January 19, 2000, that the 30 Major League club owners voted unanimously to centralize all of Baseball's internet operations into an independent technology company. Major League Baseball Advanced Media (MLBAM) was formed and charged with developing, building and managing the most comprehensive baseball experience available on the internet. In August 2002, MLB.com streamed the first-ever live, full length MLB game when the Texas Rangers and New York Yankees faced off at Yankee Stadium. Since that time, millions of baseball fans around the world have subscribed to MLB.TV, the live video streaming product that airs every game in HD to nearly 400 different devices. description:
🔴Portugal vs Uzbekistan LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group K Match, Houston Stadium | Cristiano Ronaldo | CNBC TV18
V/C: Reuters/AP 
Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal face Uzbekistan in a must-win Group K match at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as the race for the round of 32 intensifies.
Live exteriors of Houston Stadium as fans arrive to watch Portugal face Uzbekistan in the group stage of the World Cup. Portuguese fans gather to watch their men's soccer national team face Uzbekistan in the group stage of the World Cup. Fans arrive at Houston Stadium for World Cup match between Portugal and Uzbekistan.
A day after Lionel Messi became the World Cup’s all-time highest scorer, the focus shifts to his great rival, Cristiano Ronaldo, with the football world braced for a bounce-back performance from the ageing superstar forward in Portugal’s meeting with Uzbekistan. After being held to a shock 1-1 draw by DR Congo in their tournament opener, Portugal need a win to revive their knockout qualification hopes. And for Ronaldo, who had a largely anonymous display in his first appearance, the match offers a chance at redemption, as he plays catch-up with the rest of the in-form strikers in North America.
Tournament debutants Uzbekistan, on the other hand, head into the game on the back of a 3-1 defeat by Colombia, needing at least a draw to avoid elimination.

(4-2-3-1): Costa (Goalkeeper); Cancelo, Araujo, Veiga, Mendes; Neves, Vitinha; Silva, Fernandes, Neto; Ronaldo

KANSAS CITY, MISSOURI, UNITED STATES - Supporters arrive at the Kansas City Stadium for the World Cup Group J match between Argentina and Algeria.Argentina fans gather in Buenos Aires to watch the national team face Algeria in their opening World Cup group-stage match. Supporters are expected to fill bars and public viewing areas, wearing the national colors and reacting to the game as Argentina begins its campaign
Defending champions Argentina arrive at their 2026 FIFA World Cup opener in strong form after dominating CONMEBOL qualifying, winning 12 of 18 matches and finishing top of the table with 38 points and a +21 goal difference. They also carry momentum from a five-match winning streak in international friendlies, raising expectations that they can continue their winning rhythm on the world stage.
Algeria, meanwhile, come into the tournament with mixed form but renewed confidence. Under coach Vladimir Petkovic, they have shown glimpses of improvement with recent wins over the Netherlands and Bolivia, despite an inconsistent run following their AFCON quarterfinal exit to Nigeria. Their technically gifted squad could still pose a challenge if they execute their possession-based approach effectively.
Both sides now prepare for a high-stakes opener that will test Argentina’s title defence against Algeria’s unpredictability on the global stage.

title: 🔴Portugal vs Uzbekistan LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group K Match, Houston Stadium | Ronaldo | N18G
description:
🔴Portugal vs Uzbekistan LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group K Match, Houston Stadium | Cristiano Ronaldo | CNBC TV18
V/C: Reuters/AP 
Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal face Uzbekistan in a must-win Group K match at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as the race for the round of 32 intensifies.
Live exteriors of Houston Stadium as fans arrive to watch Portugal face Uzbekistan in the group stage of the World Cup. Portuguese fans gather to watch their men's soccer national team face Uzbekistan in the group stage of the World Cup. Fans arrive at Houston Stadium for World Cup match between Portugal and Uzbekistan.
A day after Lionel Messi became the World Cup’s all-time highest scorer, the focus shifts to his great rival, Cristiano Ronaldo, with the football world braced for a bounce-back performance from the ageing superstar forward in Portugal’s meeting with Uzbekistan. After being held to a shock 1-1 draw by DR Congo in their tournament opener, Portugal need a win to revive their knockout qualification hopes. And for Ronaldo, who had a largely anonymous display in his first appearance, the match offers a chance at redemption, as he plays catch-up with the rest of the in-form strikers in North America.
Tournament debutants Uzbekistan, on the other hand, head into the game on the back of a 3-1 defeat by Colombia, needing at least a draw to avoid elimination.
Portugal predicted lineup
(4-2-3-1): Costa (Goalkeeper); Cancelo, Araujo, Veiga, Mendes; Neves, Vitinha; Silva, Fernandes, Neto; Ronaldo
Uzbekistan predicted lineup

Commissioner Allan H. (Bud) Selig announced on January 19, 2000, that the 30 Major League club owners voted unanimously to centralize all of Baseball's internet operations into an independent technology company. Major League Baseball Advanced Media (MLBAM) was formed and charged with developing, building and managing the most comprehensive baseball experience available on the internet. In August 2002, MLB.com streamed the first-ever live, full length MLB game when the Texas Rangers and New York Yankees faced off at Yankee Stadium. Since that time, millions of baseball fans around the world have subscribed to MLB.TV, the live video streaming product that airs every game in HD to nearly 400 different devices. MLB.com also provides an array of mobile apps for fans to choose from, including At Bat, the highest-grossing iOS sports app of all-time. MLB.com features a stable of club beat reporters and award-winning national columnists, the largest contingent of baseball reporters under one roof, who deliver over 100 original articles every day. MLB.com also offers extensive historical information and footage, online ticket sales, official baseball merchandise, authenticated memorabilia and collectibles and fantasy games.

Major League Baseball consists of 30 teams split between the American and National Leagues. The American League, originally founded in 1901, consists of the following teams: Baltimore Orioles; Boston Red Sox; Chicago White Sox; Cleveland Indians; Detroit Tigers; Houston Astros; Kansas City Royals; Los Angeles Angels of Anaheim; Minnesota Twins; New York Yankees; Oakland Athletics; Seattle Mariners; Tampa Bay Rays; Texas Rangers; and Toronto Blue Jays. The National League, originally founded in 1876, consists of the following teams: Arizona Diamondbacks; Atlanta Braves; Chicago Cubs; Cincinnati Reds; Colorado Rockies; Los Angeles Dodgers; Miami Marlins; Milwaukee Brewers; New York Mets; Philadelphia Phillies; Pittsburgh Pirates; San Diego Padres; San Francisco Giants; St. Louis Cardinals; and Washington Nationals.

Virat Kohli is all set to make his return for Team India in the upcoming ODI series against England after being declared fully fit by the Centre of Excellence (CoE). The star batter had been under close medical observation in recent weeks, but the latest assessment has cleared him to resume full competitive action. Kohli’s availability comes as a massive boost for India ahead of a crucial white-ball assignment against a strong England side. With his fitness concerns now behind him, fans can once again expect the batting maestro to anchor India’s batting lineup. The CoE's approval has ended all speculation surrounding his participation, while the team management is relieved to have one of its most experienced match-winners back in the squad. Kohli's return not only strengthens India's batting depth but also adds invaluable leadership and experience to the dressing room. All eyes will now be on the former captain as he prepares to take the field in what promises to be a high-voltage IND vs ENG ODI series.

title: The Sigma Sports Cafe Ride - Mads Pedersen
description:
Matt Stephens is back in the Cote d’Azur for a Sigma Sports Cafe Ride with one of the fastest men on the planet. Mads Pedersen might be best-known for his UCI World Road Championship win, and out-sprinting some of the best riders in the world to win multiple Grand Tour stages. 

But off the bike, his biggest passion is restoring and driving classic cars. Desperate to impress the great Dane, Matt’s gotten his hands on a ‘classic sportscar’ of his own.

Matt parked his little surprise at the top of the Col de Madone, so it’s just as well Mads has recovered from a pre-season injury in time to guide him up the formidable climb. On the way, the pair engage in a free flowing, fascinating chat that covers everything from equipment testing for Paris-Roubaix, meeting your future self, and talking your kids out of becoming pro cyclists.

title: Australia's "Aura" Missing: Ponting Highlights World Cup Disaster | First Sports With Rupha Ramani
description:
Australia’s T20 World Cup campaign has ended in disaster. They have been dumped out before the semifinals for the second straight edition. With heavy backlash surrounding their preparation, selections, and mindset, coach Andrew McDonald insists the issue was performance, not planning. But questions remain. From questionable squad decisions involving Steve Smith and Josh Hazlewood, to the inconsistent T20 returns of Travis Head and Glenn Maxwell, and criticism from legends like Ricky Ponting - this campaign has exposed deeper structural concerns. Did Australia underestimate the tournament? Rupha Ramani breaks down what went wrong and whether Australian cricket has lost its "aura". 

Also on the show, Morocco is killing stray dogs, according to animal rights groups. This despite hosting a successful AFCON 2025-26 edition in the country. While the reports of the same came in January 2025 too, why is Morocco still going ahead with the inhumane approach with the World Cup approaching? And Olympic broadcaster Paolo Petrecca has resigned after a string of gaffe-filled commentary moments during the opening ceremony. From controversial comments about Chinese and Spanish athletes to mistaking the venue and the IOC chief, Petrecca's mistakes have sparked a political mess. 
---

About MLB.com:
Commissioner Allan H. (Bud) Selig announced on January 19, 2000, that the 30 Major League club owners voted unanimously to centralize all of Baseball's internet operations into an independent technology company. Major League Baseball Advanced Media (MLBAM) was formed and charged with developing, building and managing the most comprehensive baseball experience available on the internet. In August 2002, MLB.com streamed the first-ever live, full length MLB game when the Texas Rangers and New York Yankees faced off at Yankee Stadium. Since that time, millions of baseball fans around the world have subscribed to MLB.TV, the live video streaming product that airs every game in HD to nearly 400 different devices. MLB.com also provides an array of mobile apps for fans to choose from, including At Bat, the highest-grossing iOS sports app of all-time. MLB.com features a stable of club beat reporters and award-winning national columnists, the largest contingent of baseball reporters under one roof, who deliver over 100 original articles every day. MLB.com also offers extensive historical information and footage, online ticket sales, official baseball merchandise, authenticated memorabilia and collectibles and fantasy games.

Major League Baseball consists of 30 teams split between the American and National Leagues. The American League, originally founded in 1901, consists of the following teams: Baltimore Orioles; Boston Red Sox; Chicago White Sox; Cleveland Indians; Detroit Tigers; Houston Astros; Kansas City Royals; Los Angeles Angels of Anaheim; Minnesota Twins; New York Yankees; Oakland Athletics; Seattle Mariners; Tampa Bay Rays; Texas Rangers; and Toronto Blue Jays. The National League, originally founded in 1876, consists of the following teams: Arizona Diamondbacks; Atlanta Braves; Chicago Cubs; Cincinnati Reds; Colorado Rockies; Los Angeles Dodgers; Miami Marlins; Milwaukee Brewers; New York Mets; Philadelphia Phillies; Pittsburgh Pirates; San Diego Padres; San Francisco Giants; St. Louis Cardinals; and Washington Nationals.

About MLB.com:
Commissioner Allan H. (Bud) Selig announced on January 19, 2000, that the 30 Major League club owners voted unanimously to centralize all of Baseball's internet operations into an independent technology company. Major League Baseball Advanced Media (MLBAM) was formed and charged with developing, building and managing the most comprehensive baseball experience available on the internet. In August 2002, MLB.com streamed the first-ever live, full length MLB game when the Texas Rangers and New York Yankees faced off at Yankee Stadium. Since that time, millions of baseball fans around the world have subscribed to MLB.TV, the live video streaming product that airs every game in HD to nearly 400 different devices. MLB.com also provides an array of mobile apps for fans to choose from, including At Bat, the highest-grossing iOS sports app of all-time. MLB.com features a stable of club beat reporters and award-winning national columnists, the largest contingent of baseball reporters under one roof, who deliver over 100 original articles every day. MLB.com also offers extensive historical information and footage, online ticket sales, official baseball merchandise, authenticated memorabilia and collectibles and fantasy games.

Major League Baseball consists of 30 teams split between the American and National Leagues. The American League, originally founded in 1901, consists of the following teams: Baltimore Orioles; Boston Red Sox; Chicago White Sox; Cleveland Indians; Detroit Tigers; Houston Astros; Kansas City Royals; Los Angeles Angels of Anaheim; Minnesota Twins; New York Yankees; Oakland Athletics; Seattle Mariners; Tampa Bay Rays; Texas Rangers; and Toronto Blue Jays. The National League, originally founded in 1876, consists of the following teams: Arizona Diamondbacks; Atlanta Braves; Chicago Cubs; Cincinnati Reds; Colorado Rockies; Los Angeles Dodgers; Miami Marlins; Milwaukee Brewers; New York Mets; Philadelphia Phillies; Pittsburgh Pirates; San Diego Padres; San Francisco Giants; St. Louis Cardinals; and Washington Nationals.

Virat Kohli is all set to make his return for Team India in the upcoming ODI series against England after being declared fully fit by the Centre of Excellence (CoE). The star batter had been under close medical observation in recent weeks, but the latest assessment has cleared him to resume full competitive action. Kohli’s availability comes as a massive boost for India ahead of a crucial white-ball assignment against a strong England side. With his fitness concerns now behind him, fans can once again expect the batting maestro to anchor India’s batting lineup. The CoE's approval has ended all speculation surrounding his participation, while the team management is relieved to have one of its most experienced match-winners back in the squad. Kohli's return not only strengthens India's batting depth but also adds invaluable leadership and experience to the dressing room. All eyes will now be on the former captain as he prepares to take the field in what promises to be a high-voltage IND vs ENG ODI series.

title: The surprising math and physics behind the 2026 World Cup soccer ball
description:
Every World Cup gets its own ball, and this year's design is one of the most radical yet.

Called the Trionda, a nod to the tournament's three host countries, the U.S., Mexico, and Canada, it's made from just four interlocking panels. That's the fewest panels ever used in a World Cup ball, down from the 20-panel design used in 2022. Behind that change is a surprising amount of math and physics, as engineers try to balance aerodynamics, symmetry, and control to make sure the ball behaves the way players expect on the world's biggest stage.

title: 🔴Portugal vs Uzbekistan LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group K Match, Houston Stadium | Ronaldo | N18G
description:
🔴Portugal vs Uzbekistan LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group K Match, Houston Stadium | Cristiano Ronaldo | CNBC TV18
V/C: Reuters/AP 
Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal face Uzbekistan in a must-win Group K match at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as the race for the round of 32 intensifies.
Live exteriors of Houston Stadium as fans arrive to watch Portugal face Uzbekistan in the group stage of the World Cup. Portuguese fans gather to watch their men's soccer national team face Uzbekistan in the group stage of the World Cup. Fans arrive at Houston Stadium for World Cup match between Portugal and Uzbekistan.
A day after Lionel Messi became the World Cup’s all-time highest scorer, the focus shifts to his great rival, Cristiano Ronaldo, with the football world braced for a bounce-back performance from the ageing superstar forward in Portugal’s meeting with Uzbekistan. After being held to a shock 1-1 draw by DR Congo in their tournament opener, Portugal need a win to revive their knockout qualification hopes. And for Ronaldo, who had a largely anonymous display in his first appearance, the match offers a chance at redemption, as he plays catch-up with the rest of the in-form strikers in North America.
Tournament debutants Uzbekistan, on the other hand, head into the game on the back of a 3-1 defeat by Colombia, needing at least a draw to avoid elimination.

(4-2-3-1): Costa (Goalkeeper); Cancelo, Araujo, Veiga, Mendes; Neves, Vitinha; Silva, Fernandes, Neto; Ronaldo

Female referees have long faced unnecessary prejudice and doubt just because of their gender. They go through the same tough training, master complex rules, and make impartial decisions on the pitch. Every whistle they blow is based on professionalism, not gender.
Let’s put aside stereotypes, recognize their in
 efforts, and show sincere respect to every female match official. They belong on the football field just as much as anyone else.
If you support female referees, hit the like button and share this video. Feel free to leave your thoughts in the comment section below!

About MLB.com:
Commissioner Allan H. (Bud) Selig announced on January 19, 2000, that the 30 Major League club owners voted unanimously to centralize all of Baseball's internet operations into an independent technology company. Major League Baseball Advanced Media (MLBAM) was formed and charged with developing, building and managing the most comprehensive baseball experience available on the internet. In August 2002, MLB.com streamed the first-ever live, full length MLB game when the Texas Rangers and New York Yankees faced off at Yankee Stadium. Since that time, millions of baseball fans around the world have subscribed to MLB.TV, the live video streaming product that airs every game in HD to nearly 400 different devices. MLB.com also provides an array of mobile apps for fans to choose from, including At Bat, the highest-grossing iOS sports app of all-time. MLB.com features a stable of club beat reporters and award-winning national columnists, the largest contingent of baseball reporters under one roof, who deliver over 100 original articles every day. MLB.com also offers extensive historical information and footage, online ticket sales, official baseball merchandise, authenticated memorabilia and collectibles and fantasy games.

Major League Baseball consists of 30 teams split between the American and National Leagues. The American League, originally founded in 1901, consists of the following teams: Baltimore Orioles; Boston Red Sox; Chicago White Sox; Cleveland Indians; Detroit Tigers; Houston Astros; Kansas City Royals; Los Angeles Angels of Anaheim; Minnesota Twins; New York Yankees; Oakland Athletics; Seattle Mariners; Tampa Bay Rays; Texas Rangers; and Toronto Blue Jays. The National League, originally founded in 1876, consists of the following teams: Arizona Diamondbacks; Atlanta Braves; Chicago Cubs; Cincinnati Reds; Colorado Rockies; Los Angeles Dodgers; Miami Marlins; Milwaukee Brewers; New York Mets; Philadelphia Phillies; Pittsburgh Pirates; San Diego Padres; San Francisco Giants; St. Louis Cardinals; and Washington Nationals.

FIFA World Cup 2026 LIVE | ARGENTINA VS AUSTRIA | Watch FIFA World Cup | FIFA Full Match Live 


DALLAS, Texas — Live from Dallas Stadium in Arlington, Texas, fans are arriving in their thousands to witness a blockbuster Group J fixture at the FIFA World Cup 2026 as defending champions Argentina face off against a highly competitive Austria squad. Following a spectacular opening matchday where Lionel Messi scored a historic hat-trick to defeat Algeria 3-0, the world-ranked number one Albiceleste are looking to secure their place in the Round of 32. However, Ralf Rangnick’s formidable Austrian side, fresh off their own 3-1 victory over Jordan, present a stern test for the reigning champions at the home of the Dallas Cowboys. This top-of-the-table clash is set to determine who commands Group J, with Lionel Messi also on the verge of breaking the all-time World Cup goalscoring record. title: ALI SIDDIQ: MY FATHER  [Full Stand Up Comedy Special - 65 minutes]
description:
Ali Siddiq: My Father delivers a deeply personal, hilarious, and unforgettable comedy experience centered around one of the most iconic characters in his life. Fans of Ali’s storytelling know his real-life stories are raw, vivid, emotional, and laugh-out-loud funny. This time, he dedicates an entire special to the man who helped shape his journey & perspective. Blending masterful storytelling, sharp humor, and heartfelt truth, My Father showcases Ali Siddiq at his most authentic and entertaining. This isn’t just another stand-up special; it’s a cinematic comedy experience filled with family memories, life lessons, and the kind of laughter that stays with you long after the show ends.

Subscribe for more stand-up comedy, storytelling specials, and exclusive releases from Ali Siddiq.

#AliSiddiq #MyFatherSpecial #StandUpComedy #ComedySpecial #StorytellingComedy #PPVComedy #ComedyTrailer #LimitedRelease

Check out tour dates: https://www.alisiddiq.com/

Connect on social media!
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alisiddiq/?hl=en
Facebook: https://facebook.com/ali.siddiq.92
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thealisiddiq
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ali_speaks

Ali Siddiq is a stand-up comedian, public speaker, and writer out of Houston. Ali’s unique style of stand-up began behind the walls of incarceration, an incubator for interesting experiences and good stories.  
 
People received their first taste of Ali Siddiq when he appeared on HBO's DEF COMEDY JAM and LIVE FROM GOTHAM, and in 2013 he was named Comedy Central's "#1 Comic to Watch".  In 2014, Ali impressed comedy enthusiasts by displaying his ability to captivate an audience with his "Mexicans Got On Boots" tale, descriptive storytelling, with over 15 million views, of a prison riot on THIS IS NOT HAPPENING, the first of three appearances.  His stories continued with his HALF HOUR special, which premiered on Comedy Central in the fall of 2016.  Immediately following the premiere of that special, Comedy Central offered Ali an hour-special where he performed for inmates live in a Texas jail, sending Ali back to where it all started. The hour special, Ali Siddiq: It’s Bigger Than These Bars, premiered in February 2018 on Comedy Central.  In 2019, Ali could be seen as a Top 5 finalist on NBC’s BRING THE FUNNY. Most recently, Ali could be seen as a guest on THE JOE ROGAN EXPERIENCE.

title: Kirk Fox: That Guy | FULL COMEDY SPECIAL
description:
Kirk Fox is "That Guy"! In his first one-hour comedy special, comedian and seasoned actor Kirk Fox, a master of dry humor, sharp observations, and brilliantly awkward storytelling, explores the person we've all seen—the guy sitting alone at the end of the bar, making questionable choices and navigating life with a unique sense of logic. Kirk comes to the realization: "that guy" is him.

Unlike a traditional collection of stand-up comedy story telling, Kirk Fox weaves the material together into one continuous comedic journey, rewarding audiences who stick around as seemingly unrelated stories and observations gradually connect in unexpected ways.

Whether you know Kirk Fox by name or simply as "that guy," Kirk Fox is a veteran actor, writer, and stand-up comedian with more than 90 film and television credits. Kirk is known for many roles such as the unforgettable "Sewage Joe" on NBC's Parks and Recreation, "Kenny Boy" on the acclaimed FX/Hulu series Reservation Dogs, and juror Pat McCurdy on the Emmy-nominated hit Jury Duty, Curb Your Enthusiasm. 

Kirk has also appeared in Forgetting Sarah Marshall, Tom Segura's Bad Thoughts, Brooklyn Nine-Nine, Community, The Mick, How to Rock, Deadwood, Reno 911!, a film Kirk wrote and starred in Tennis, Anyone...? and has dozens of other television and film projects in the works and about to be released. 📖More about Dusty:
Dusty Slay is a Nashville-based stand-up comedian with a baritone voice so smooth it’s like champagne in your ears. Dusty has been seen on Netflix, The Tonight Show with Jimmy Fallon, Jimmy Kimmel Live, Comedy Central, Lights Out with David Spade, and on the Grand Ole Opry. Slay can be heard on The Bobby Bones Podcast “BobbyCast” and on Sirius XM.

Dusty is grateful that he gets to do a job he loves while remaining true to himself, close to his family, and connected to the community that inspires the everyday humor that has made him a star. He entertains with his clean comedy that doesn’t feel squeaky clean but you can still listen to him when your kids are in the car. Rooted by his faith in God, Dusty avoids political and polarizing topics, because he understands that his talent is telling jokes that unite audiences to “Have a Good Time”.
